overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt riding a horse through rural landscapes and military encampments. The clip transitions between open countryside with mountain views and populated settlement areas with wooden fortifications and medieval architecture.

segments.scene_description: Geralt rides through open grasslands on a dirt trail, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. The landscape is sparse with scattered trees and wooden fences lining the path as he approaches a distant settlement.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a bustling military encampment with wooden watchtowers, canvas tents, and groups of soldiers walking about. Geralt rides through the camp on a dirt path, navigating past wooden fortifications and hay carts while soldiers move through the area.

segments.scene_description: Leaving the camp behind, Geralt rides through open countryside with a dense pine forest on the left and a lake visible to the right. The path continues through tall grass as he passes a wooden hay cart on the trail.

rides through dense group of soldiers near settlement entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a fortified settlement with multiple wooden watchtowers and gatehouses. He rides through groups of soldiers walking along the path, passing wooden barricades and military tents as he enters the settlement proper.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from open, mountainous grasslands through a series of military installations and rural landscapes. It begins with Geralt riding along a dirt trail through sparse grasslands, with snow-capped mountains framing the distant horizon. As he approaches a settlement, the open terrain shifts into a bustling military encampment filled with wooden watchtowers, canvas tents, and patrolling soldiers. The scene then opens back into the countryside, passing a dense pine forest and a lake before the path leads through tall grass and past a lone hay cart. Finally, the environment tightens once more as the camera follows Geralt through wooden barricades and gatehouses into a heavily fortified settlement.
